name: Fiesta Chicken
recipeIngredient: Several dashes bottled Hot Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. 12 oz boned skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch pieces
2. In a large skillet combine tomato sauce, orange juice, onion, raisins, pimento, oregano, chili powder, garlic, and hot pepper sauce. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in chicken; return to boiling. Cover and simmer for an additional 12-15 minutes, or until the chicken is tender and no longer pink.
4. Meanwhile, combine cornstarch and water. Stir into skillet. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cook and stir for another 2 minutes.
5. Toss parsley with rice. Serve the chicken mixture over rice.
